entry.title: Difference
entry.content:
Hello!

Might sound as a dumb question...can someone explain the difference between the two courses

Training for SAP S/4HANA in Procurement and Training for SAP ERP in Procurement courses

Thank you

entry.title: SAP SD Certification for 2 year experience
entry.content:
I have 2 year of SAP SD module experience and I am planning to complete SAP SD certification.

I am not able to find correct certification. Anyone please suggest me which certification I have complete to get best opportunity in SAP SD module.

Please paste certification name in comment

entry.title: Multi-language documents from DMS to SF
entry.content: We would like to benchmark with other organizations. How does your company handle assigning multi-language documents from an external Document Management System (DMS) integrated with SuccessFactors? Do you send a single DMS document containing multiple languages (single file) or do keep each language as separate documents in DMS and create content objects for each language in SuccessFactors as a package under a parent Item?

entry.title: Multiple Language Document Training for DMS to SF (training required for only 1 language)
entry.content: How does your company handle the updates to multi-language documents from your DMS to SuccessFactors (SF) when only one language needs to updated but it is part of a single SuccessFactors item (document) that has a multiple language selection menu?

entry.title: Open.sap.com changed for training.sap : is there a roadmap ?
entry.content:
Sap insiders on customer site would like to build long lasting relationship with sap knowledge.

Sap have a variety of contents, different by region, different way to pay it, not centralized, certification is complex and recognition is not garanteed.


in order to sell the development initiative, we need a clear 2-3 years roadmap on where sap is going to

« Sell » the need for training and benefits for companies.

Current situation is that is take 2 years in average to get a in person training for cloud solutions if end user follows his company policy, sap training slot availability, etc.

Companies are not making blank training checks : they carefully review training before approving.

If sap knows the math, in 3 years we will be in 2026, close to 2027.

If today’s SAP community member have no clear view

Where to find learning content

What quality of content they will get

When they will be able to train

Who they can train

They will simply no train themself.

So the effort to make to turn training more attractive, is less on the platform name (trainin, open, learninghub,micro learning) than the ease of access and the clarity of the information.

Training slots should be available long in advance to give a chance to be filled.

If i ve missed a roadmap communicated by email by training team, please have my appology.

But i have not seen anything so far

entry.title: Setting up SAP Enable Now to Custom Training Content.
entry.content:
Based on my experience, I assume that we need to complete different setup activities for the following scenarios to create custom content using SAP Enable Now. I have listed down high-level setup activities under each scenario.

Please help to validate these high-level Setup Activities required to create the custom content under each scenario:

Scenario 01: Setting up SAP Enable Now for creating custom Simulations and Job Aids (Words/PDFs)

High-level Setup Activities

  • Set up a Work Area.
  • Set up a Content folder structure in the Work Area.
  • Add Author Roles in Enable Now Manager.
  • Install Producer in Authors' machines.
  • Create Templates for Simulations and Job Aids.

Scenario 02: Setting up SAP Enable Now for creating custom In-App (Context Sensitive) Help

Here, let's assume that we need to create custom In-App content for SAP S4 Hana (Fiori).

High-level Setup Activities

  • Enabling SSO (Single Sign On) for SAP Enable Now and the targeted SAP system.
  • Set up a Work Area.
  • Set up a Content folder structure in the Work Area.
  • Link the Work Area to appropriate SAP S4 Hana Instance (e.g. Test Instance), in which the custom content will be authored.
  • Activate SAP Companion in the SAP S4 Hana (Fiori) site.
  • Enable SAP Companion at the App Level in SAP Fiori.
  • Add Author Roles in Enable Now Manager to create custom In-App content (Guided Tours).

Please help to validate the high-level Setup Activities listed above. Also, kindly add if I missed any imp. Setup Activity.

entry.title: C_TADM70_22 SAP Certified Technology Associate - OS/DB Migration for SAP NetWeaver 7.52
entry.content:
Hi,

What exam is replacing this exam from March?

C_TADM70_22 SAP Certified Technology Associate - OS/DB Migration for SAP NetWeaver 7.52

Kind Regards,

Johan

entry.title: About SAP Enable Now Licences
entry.content:
With regard to SAP Enable Now (SEN), I assume that we have the following two types of licences:

  • Developer Licences: Used to develop/author learning content in SEN, e.g., simulations, In-app step-by-step guided tours, e-learning courses, etc.
  • Learner Licences: Used to view/consume the learning content published in SEN.

My question is - Do I need to buy Developer Licences and Learner Licences separately? OR, If I buy Learner Licences only, can they be used for content development as well? For example, with Learner Licence, a user's ID can be configured in SEN, and if I assign Author role to the same user, then that user can develop content as well?

entry.title: QR CODE FOR TAINING
entry.content:
Good morning Team,

I aim to streamline the process of recording employee training completion within our organisation. Upon finishing a training course, I intend for our team members to mark themselves as 'completed' by scanning a QR code. This QR code will be linked to our SAP or SuccessFactors system, ensuring a seamless integration and accurate tracking of training progress within our workforce. Is this possible? If so how? Also will it work I SAP 4 HANA

entry.title: Differences between SAP Enable Now Cloud Vs. On-premise licences
entry.content:
First,

I understand that Clients can buy SAP Enable Now (SEN) licences as On-premise version OR Cloud version.

  • We can purchase SEN Cloud licences from SAP Enable Now Cloud, which is a public cloud.
  • When we purchase SEN On-premise licences, they are mainly used in the private cloud (AWS, GCP, Azure, etc.). OR does the On-premise version mean they are physically installed in users' local computers?

Please confirm whether my above understanding is correct.

Next,

  • I assume that when we buy SEN On-premise licences, we buy Developer Licences and Learner Licences separately.
  • However, when we buy SEN Cloud licences, there is no categorization like Developer Licences and Learner Licences. In this case, SEN licences purchased can be used as Developer ones or Learner ones.

Please confirm whether my above understanding is correct.

entry.title: Sap on AWS
entry.content: I'm freshers i completed AWS solution architecture course and I want to shift on sap .what is a roadmap

Sincerely,

Shaden

entry.title: NPL License website doesn't work atm
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using a NPL trial here for training purposes.

I tried to get a new NPL license, but the site wants credentials, rejects mine and refuses to load.

Can you please fix that? Or was that license website shut down?

This one here:

https://go.support.sap.com/minisap/#/minisap

I found another message on here, written February 2020 and it seems the license server had a problem on your end.

Kind Regards

M. Kiewitz

entry.title: Scheduling Exam - Purchased Attempts
entry.content:
Hi!

I am trying to schedule an exam for C_ARSCC_2308 SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP Ariba Supply Chain Collaboration.

I have purchased 6 attempts for exam. However, when I click on shedule an exam, it shows up that I do not have any exam attempt. Could you help me fix this problem?

entry.title: SAP FICO and SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I want to learn SAPFICO. In one of the training institute, they are training in SAPS/4HANA, because it is a server and SAPFICO is a module. At the end they will issue a SAP FICO completion course certificate.

I request for your suggestion.

Thank you.

entry.title: S-User ID Expiration / SAP Certifications
entry.content:
Hello. My S-User S0019675163 is expiring on 01.01.2024, which is linked to 8 SAP certifications that I have achieved.

I have linked this account to my SAP Universal ID already. Is there anything else I need to do to ensure that my certifications are not deleted? Can I transfer the certifications to my new S-User ID S0025412106?

Thank you & kind regards

Michael Janits

I'm currently taking the course "Explore Integrated Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA" and I was trying to open the first exercise, but it gets stuck on this loading screen.
Can anyone help me with this?

entry.title: Is there any way to import a saved R xgboost model into HANA and load it?
entry.content: If you've saved an XGBoost model locally and want to import it into HANA, you can follow these steps. Since R on HANA primarily deals with data frames, you might need to use a combination of RStudio or Python and then transfer the results to HANA.

entry.title: Curriculum for certification E_ACTCLD_23 is not fully available
entry.content:
Hi Activate colleagues,

I am willing to start my preparation for "E_ACTCLD_23 - SAP Certified Specialist - SAP Activate for Cloud Solutions Project Manager" and, while giving an initial review of the topics to be covered, I realized there is a topic "SAP Cloud Application Lifecycle Management" which receives > 12% of weight and which points to openSAP course CALM1. However, when getting to openSAP, it clearly says that this course was retired on October 2023.

Is there any replacement for this course? or are the contents already covered inside of ACT100 and ACT200?

Appreciate suggestions and advices!

Cheers.

Alejandro.

PS: just adding some SAP colleagues related to Activate, just in case any of you has the right answer. daniel.ciecko jan.musil rbyrne adnette.kamugisha danielle.beeken lbettuzzi

entry.title: Is there another option for mass final confirmation?
entry.content:
Hello,

I currently use SAP Easy Access t-code COR6N (Single Screen Entry of Confirmations) in order to do a final confirmation on process orders.

Each one of our trucks contains multiple process orders for one load. COR6N requires that I enter each Order Number plus the Order Quantity in order to confirm the order to be able to release it via QA16.

Is there any other T-code I can use to do a mass final confirmation for one load instead of a single entry for final confirmation?
